titleStmt.title: SII 4.798: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 798. (A.R. No. 338 of 1892). ON A STONE IN THE NORTH-WEST CORNER OF THE COURTYARD OF THE RAMESVARA TEMPLE AT TADPATRI, TADPATRI TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ [. 1*] ¿ śrī
nāgēṁdrasurēṁdrapūjitapadāṁbhōjadvayaṁ kēvaḷajñānākāśavibhāsitākhiḷa
jagatsaṁjātanānāpadā.¨rtthānīkaṁ bhuvanatrayaprabhuvinōdārādhyanā¨rhaṁtyalakṣmīnāthaṁ namagādinātha
jinanīgiṣṭā¨rtthasaṁsiddhiyaṁ [. 2*] navaratnabharitajaḷacaranivahaparikṣubhitabahaḷakallōḷarava . pravighū
[¨rṇna]mānalavaṇā¨rṇnavaparivritamenipuduṁṭu jaṁbūdvīpaṁ [. 3*] Adu śatasahasra yōja
nagaditasuvistāramāgi samavṛttākā . radini¨rppudadaṟa madhyapradēśadoḷmaṁdharādri sogayisi tō
[¨rkku] [. 4*] mērumahāmahīdharada teṁkaṇa bhāratava¨rṣadoḷu manōhāriyideṁbinanoḷpakuṁtaḷadēśada
pū¨rbabhāgadoḷu . sāri merippudaṁdhradharaṇītaḷavaṁdadaṟeṁde teṁkaṇādhāriṇiyallipennaparināḍuniraṁtara
Oppitōṟuguṁ [. 5*] Ājanapadakke tale sale rājāśrayamenisi tāḷipāṟapuraṁ vi . bhrājisuguvamarapannagarājape
rakkeṇeyenippa mahimōnnatiyiṁ [. 6*] penna nisa¨rggadiṁdevalibanneyanūnajaḻapravāhasaṁpanne nadīnadaprakaradoḷa kaḍuceṁ
nne taṭīmahīruhō.tpaṁnaphaḷāvipaṁne nijani¨rmaḷinōdakadiṁ prasanne yeṁdunnativettu tō¨rpa nadi tatpuramaṁ baḻasi
¨rppudettaluṁ [. 7*] phaḷapuṁgaḻpōpētanānātarulategaḷinutphullanīrējaṣaṁḍaṁgaḷinatyuddaṁḍakūjatpikaśukako
ḷadiṁ gaṁdhaśāḷēyavaprā . vaḷiyiṁ puṁḍrēkṣuvāṭaṁgaḷinupavanavāpū¨rṇnavāpītaṭākaṁ
gaḷināśāmaṁḍaḻaṁ tatpuravarada bahi¨rbbhāgadoḷu nāḍerayya [. 8*] viḷasadubrahmapuraṁgaḷiṁ vivi
dhakūṭōttuṁgadēvālayaṁgaḷinatyāyataramyaha¨rmyatatiyiṁ nānāsphuradratnasaṁ . kuḻarājadvi
paṇistaḷaṁgaḷinanēkākī¨rṇnapaṇyāṁganōjvaḷasauthaṁgaḷināvagaṁ sogayi[si¨rkuṁ] tatpurābhyaṁtaraṁ [. 9*] ta
tpurapratipāḷakarappa mahārājaranvayavadeṁteṁdaḍe . bhuvanaprakhyātasōmānvayajanitamahā
rājaruttuṁgakaṁṭhīravapīṭhādhyāsita¨rkkaḷpalabarakasugaḷmuṁne saṁda¨rddaśāsā.vivarāṁta[¨r]vva¨rttikī¨rttidhva
jaravaroḷudāttapratāpaprabhāvapravidhūtānyāvalēpaṁ negaḷdanavaniyaṁ pāḷisalu kattirājaṁ [. 10*] Atya
rasaṁgepuṭṭida tanūbhavanāhavamalladēvanādityasamapratāpanidhi tatsati bāgaladēvi tānaruṁ . dhatyu
pamāne tatpriyasutaṁ kaligaṁgamahībhujaṁ parauddhatyavibhēdi tadramaṇi tāṁ mahadēviyenippa
ḷoppuvaḷu [. 11*] Āgaṁgāvanipāḻakaṁgavesakaṁ bettā mahādēvigaṁ rāgaṁ kaimige puṭṭidaṁ pri
yasutaṁ śrīsōmidēvaṁ jayō.dyōgaṁ taṁnripakāṁte bhūmisutegaṁ bhūbhrittanūjātegaṁ śrī
gaṁ kaṁcaladēvi tāne samanādaḷu bhāgyasaubhāgyadoḷu [. 12*] Aribhūbhritkuṁbhikuṁbhasthaḷavigaḷitaraktā¨rdra
muktāphaḷāḷisphuritōdyadraṁgavallīviḷasitaraṇaraṁgāṁgaṇōdvrittabāhā.parighāvi¨rbhūtavai
ku¨rvvaṇa vividhabhujaprētabhētāḷabhūtōddhuratājēgīyamānā¨rjjitanijavijayaṁ sōmidēvakṣitī
śaṁ [. 13*] Odavidarājyaśrīyiṁdudāttanenisi¨rddasōvidēvanripaṁgaṁ . padapina kaṁcaladēviga mudayi
sidaṁ priyakumāranudayādityaṁ [. 14*] madadvairinripāḷasainyatimirapradhvaṁsanaṁ geydupē¨rcciḍe
rāgaṁ nijamaṁḍaḷakkeseye dikcakrāṁtamaṁ taṁna tē . jadagu¨rvviṁ samaṟuttavabhyudayamaṁ
kaikoṁḍasaypiṁda viṁtudayādityakumāranapratihatōdagrapratāpōdayaṁ [. 15*] pratya
¨rtthinripatibaḷatimirātyayamaṁ māḷpa tējadiṁ sōmanripā . pattyanenisida kumāraṁ pra
tyakṣa tāne nōḷpaḍudeyādityaṁ [. 16*] smaranaṁ rūpinoḷiṁdranaṁ vibhavadoḷu kānīnanaṁ dānadoḷu
hariyaṁ vikramaśaktiyoḷu yamajanaṁ satyōktiyoḷu tīvrabhā . skaranaṁ tējadoḷaṁ
bujaprabhavanaṁ cātu¨ryyadoḷu hēmabhūdharamaṁ dhai¨ryyadoḷeyde pōlvanudeyādityō ¨rvvarā
vallabha [. 17*] Udayādityakumāraṁ kadanadoḷidirāda madavadahitamahībhri . tsudatiyara
vadanavanajakkadavakulaṁ māḍuvaṁdavidu basavaṁda [. 18*] Ā nripana vanite sakaḷakaḷānidhi saubh(yā)gyabhōgabhāgini
sasibiṁ . bānane rājaladēvi yaśōnaṁdanavanavasaṁtalakṣmiyenippaḷu [. 19*] tatkāṁtāmanōvallabhaṁ sva
styanēkasamarasaṁghaṭṭasaṁjātavijayalakṣmīsamāliṁgitaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷaṁ kṣatriyapavitra
bhuvanatriṇētranauduṁbarābharaṇaṁ pāṁḍyagajakēsari kalukaḍepuravarādhīśvaraṁ Aṣṭama
hāsiddhi siddhavaṭadēvadibyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabaḷasādhakanāmādisamastapraśastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ traiḷōkyamalla bhujabaḷavīranārāyaṇa pratāpakumāranude
yādityadēvamahārājaru śrīmadrājadhāni tāṭipāṟapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire Alliya caṁdranāthapāruśvanāthadēvara basadiya sthānadācā¨ryyā
vaḷiyalli . sukritamene mūlasaṁghadoḷakuṭiḻadēsigaṇa koṁḍakuṁdānvaya pu . stakagacchada
lli piriduṁ prakaṭīkritaviṁgaḷēśvarada baḷiyesegu [. 20*] Alli negaḷtevetta yatisaṁkoḷadoḷpiriduṁ pra
siddhareṁdeḻaruveyda¨rkū¨rttu parikī¨rttise bāhubalabratīṁdraru . tpullasarōjanētraranavadya
caritraramōgha saṁbhavāpallatikālavitrarene va¨rttisida[¨r]vvasudhātaḷāgradoḷu [. 21*] Akaḷaṁkacarita
raruhatsakaḷāgamavēdigaḷu niraṁtarasukhasā . dhakaravara śiṣyarene bhānukī¨rttibhaṭṭāraka¨rjjagannuta
rādaru [. 22*] tatsiśyaru . kṣitipatipūjita¨rpparamajainamatāṁbudhiva¨rddhana¨rṇnayānvitarakhi
ḷāgamā¨rtthapariśuddhamahāmatigaḷnirastaduḥ . kṛtarupaśā(ṁ)ntiyuktarenipoṁdu pogaḷtege
bhānukī¨rttisadbratisuta mēghacaṁdramunimukhyare yōgyariḷātaḷāgradoḷu [. 23*] Iṁtu samastaguṇasaṁ
pa(ṁ)narappa mēghacaṁdradēva¨rgge sakava¨rṣa 1130 neya kāḷayuktasaṁvatsarada māgha ba 15 si bri
havārada sū¨ryagrahaṇadalu kālaṁka¨rci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi Ā basadiya khaṁḍasphuṭitajī[¨rṇnō]
ddhārakaṁ dēvaraṣṭavidhā¨rccanegaṁ Āhāradānakaṁ caṁdrā¨rkkastāyiyāgi biṭṭa vritti toṟeya baḍaga bhū
ṣaṇabhaṭara kālveIṁ mūḍa guyyage mōpūra bhairavaniṁ teṁka sauḷu ma 2 vaṁganūra baṭeya rāvikūḍeIṁ teṁka ma
ṇalu ma 1 gōnahāḷalu ma 1 cikaranukaṇuveyiṁ paḍuva maḍi ma 1 . svasti śrīmatu vaḍḍabyavahāri ma
ṇiyamaseṭṭiya mallayya nālūrakāluveyalu gadde gor 1 keyi ma 1 . svasti śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bāhatta
raniyōgādhipati bīḍinarakṣapāḷakaṁ Udayādityadēvarājyasamuddharaṇaṁ taḷāri cidepanāyaka taṁna kā
luveyalāhāradānakke koṭa gade 10 koḷa gada bede . svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā .
ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi [. 24*] Ivanīmā¨rggavineydepāḷisidavaṁgiṣṭā¨rtthasaṁsi
ddhi saṁbhavikuṁ po(ṁ)ṇḍaḷidaṁge gaṁgegayekēdāraṁ kurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḷu pē
sade pā¨rbbaraṁ kavileyaṁ strībālaraṁ liṁgiyappavaraṁ koṁdanavaṁ svagōtrasahitaṁ bīḷguṁ nigō
ḷaṁgaḷoḷu [. 25*]
Digital edition of SII 4.798 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
